name: ownware-law
description: Legal counsel agent — reviews contracts, drafts agreements, researches case law, checks compliance, and produces legal memoranda. Multi-agent with specialized subagents for research, analysis, drafting, and compliance.

avatar.symbol: <line x1="32" y1="14" x2="32" y2="38" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="20" y1="20" x2="44" y2="20" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M20 20 L16 30 L24 30 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.7"/><path d="M44 20 L40 30 L48 30 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.7"/><rect x="24" y="42" width="16" height="3" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity="0.4"/>

subagents.name: researcher
subagents.description: Legal research specialist. Finds case law, statutes, regulations, and precedent. Fast, read-only, exhaustive.

subagents.name: analyst
subagents.description: Document analysis specialist. Deep reads contracts, policies, and legal documents. Extracts terms, obligations, risks, and anomalies.

subagents.name: drafter
subagents.description: Legal drafting specialist. Writes contracts, memos, briefs, and correspondence. Precise language, proper structure, no ambiguity.

subagents.name: checker
subagents.description: Compliance and regulatory specialist. Scans documents and policies against regulatory frameworks (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, CCPA, etc.).
